evals.description: Full SEO validation — 11-point pass/fail checklist for a complete post
assertions: Output includes a pass/fail checklist with at least 11 SEO checkpoints
Checkpoints include: title tag, meta description, H1, heading hierarchy, internal links, external links, canonical URL, OG title, OG description, Twitter Card, URL structure
Each checkpoint has a Pass or Fail status
Failed checkpoints include a specific fix (not vague advice like 'improve your title')
Output includes an overall pass/fail summary

evals.description: Title tag optimization — validates keyword placement and length

input.title: WordPress Security: The Ultimate Guide to Protecting Your Site in 2025

assertions: Output confirms whether the target keyword appears in the title
Output flags if title exceeds 60 characters (this title is 68 chars)
Output includes a suggested shorter title if the current one is too long
Keyword placement assessment notes whether the keyword is near the beginning

evals.description: Missing meta description — flags absence and provides a template
assertions: Output flags the missing meta description as a Fail
Output provides a template or example meta description (150-160 characters)
Suggested meta description includes the target keyword
Suggested meta description is compelling and includes a call to action or value prop
